name: jstack-subagents
description: Top-level JStack command that deploys the right specialist subagent team.

interface.shortDescription: Deploy the right team, normally two or three specialists
interface.longDescription: Top-level Codex command for JStack specialist-team mode. This command is explicit approval to use the right subagent team for the task when multi-agent tools are available, while keeping the Lead Engineer accountable for synthesis and delivery.
defaultPrompt: Deploy the right JStack specialist team.
